description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Static code analysis (clang-tidy) that runs on every push and on opened, synchronized, or reopened pull requests. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, caches and downloads the Vulkan SDK if necessary, installs system dependencies including clang-tidy-15, configures the project with CMake using clang-15, lists files to analyze, runs clang-tidy in parallel on C++ and header files, and summarizes warnings.
